# Do you want to build an online community? (Get 70% OFF Today!)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-03 17:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 358

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Looking to build a private online community on your site?

With an online community site, you can offer full-scale social
networking features like groups, forum discussions, online
courses, and more.

This is especially helpful if you want to bring your audience
together for learning and collaboration without losing data and
control to giant social media platforms.

Unfortunately, most community-building platforms on the market
are extremely expensive and offer limited customizability and
features.

This is where BuddyBoss ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1YAPYVsE6suh-hzCy1zeVzZovgCf0-f5LXxxCq5PHO0 ) comes in.

BuddyBoss offers everything you need to build a community site
WITHOUT the high costs.

Thousands of creators, business owners, universities, churches,
and organizations all over the world use BuddyBoss to create
their online communities and mobile apps.

Here are a few things you'll get with BuddyBoss:

- Social Groups: Create themed groups where members can interact
with each other. For example, you might create groups for
specific hobbies, geographical areas, or other interests. Members
can then join these groups and connect with like-minded people.

- Forum discussions: Boost engagement on your community website,
and encourage members to form relationships with one another.

- Activity feed: An activity feed is like a newsfeed for your
WordPress website, showing recent activity such as new posts,
comments, and group activity. It’s a great way to keep your
members updated on what’s happening and helps to create a sense
of community.

- E-learning integration: Integrate with popular LMS platforms to
offer gamified learning experience to your audience.

- Custom branded mobile app: Create your own custom native
Android and iOS apps for your community websites. It’s fully
white-labeled meaning the app matches your brand.

If you always wanted to build a private online community, then
NOW is the right time.

Today, BuddyBoss is offering a HUGE discount, up to 70% OFF!

Simply click on the link below, and the discount will be applied
to the cart automatically.
